text_original: Governing a great state is like cooking small fish.
text_normalized: Governing a great state is like cooking small fish.

text_original: Let the kingdom be governed according to the Dao, and the manes of the departed will not manifest their spiritual energy.
text_normalized: Let the kingdom be governed according to the Dao, and the manes of the departed will not manifest their spiritual energy.

text_original: It is not that those manes have not that spiritual energy, but it will not be employed to hurt men.
text_normalized: It is not that those manes have not that spiritual energy, but it will not be employed to hurt men.

text_original: It is not that it could not hurt men, but neither does the ruling sage hurt them.
text_normalized: It is not that it could not hurt men, but neither does the ruling sage hurt them.

text_original: When these two do not injuriously affect each other, their good influences converge in the virtue (of the Dao).
text_normalized: When these two do not injuriously affect each other, their good influences converge in the virtue (of the Dao).
